June 2025 West Bengal credit bureau benchmark against Sarala 2025 snapshot. Lower balance-weighted PAR is better.

Filters

Reading the gap

Negative gap means Sarala performs better than bureau on balance-weighted PAR. Positive gap means Sarala performs worse.
